# VoiceAIger

> AI travel agent that calls you back in seconds with rebooking options and hotel suggestions after flight disruptions

## Overview

VoiceAIger is a voice-first AI service powered by Sabre GDS and Claude AI that handles flight cancellations and delays through automated phone calls. When a flight is disrupted, the system notifies users automatically and calls them within 30 seconds to search real-time flight inventory and hotel availability, completing rebooking in a single 2-minute conversation.

## Key Features

- **Voice-first AI**: Natural phone conversations without requiring app downloads or form submissions
- **Real-time rebooking**: Access to live flight availability across hundreds of carriers via Sabre GDS
- **Hotel suggestions**: Proactive hotel search near arrival airports for late-arriving rebooking options
- **Instant confirmation**: Bookings created in Sabre GDS with confirmation numbers provided during the call
- **End-to-end handling**: Complete management of flight disruption resolution

## Technology Stack

- **Sabre GDS**: Real-time inventory and booking system
- **Claude AI**: Powered by Anthropic
- **VocalBridge**: Voice layer for production and sandbox environments

## Pages

- https://voiceaiger-web.vercel.app/ — Landing page, waitlist signup, product overview
